svg.text: Strong Brand Assets Provide Foundation for Loyalty Strategy
Brand equity is high — the gap is in post-purchase experience, not product appeal. Kimsoong's eco-conscious image and value positioning are strategic differentiators.
• Reputation for reliability at competitive prices
• HQ near Paris; franchises across most EU countries
• 10-year market share growth at lower end
• "Eco-car" with alternative power source in development
• Positions brand for future green regulation compliance
50/50 cost-sharing between head office and European franchises — minimises per-unit investment risk
Profit pressure means objectives must be achieved at low cost — high-ROI initiatives are essential
